attributes.description: Amcache Driver Packages: Enumerates driver package metadata from the Windows Amcache.hve registry hive (Root\InventoryDriverPackage). Records package class, version, provider, directory, and associated hardware IDs. Links to both DeviceContainers and DevicePnPs for cross-referencing driver provenance.
attributes.query:
-- Amcache Driver Packages: Driver package metadata from Amcache
-- Source: elastic_amcache_driver_package (Root\InventoryDriverPackage)
-- Forensic value: Driver provenance, package class, provider, associated hardware IDs

SELECT
  *,
  datetime(timestamp, 'unixepoch') AS record_time
FROM elastic_amcache_driver_package
ORDER BY timestamp DESC;
